verdicts.corrected_value: Team chat and collaboration platform with a REST API add-on for automating workspace actions (messages, channels, members, webhooks).
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Pumble as a team communication and collaboration tool, which aligns with the recorded description.
The URL for the auth methods returned a 404 error, making it impossible to verify the claim.
The evidence confirms that API keys can be generated via the workspace UI and that no paid plan is required for API access.
The documentation confirms the existence of a REST API and describes its capabilities, supporting the recorded value.
The ability to install the API add-on and generate API keys without requiring admin approval supports the claim of buildability.
